zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Hepburn of Whitsome於1475年出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾吉爾斯時，她的父親Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome31歲，母親Janet Napier35歲。她於1495年與William Livingston 4th Lord Livingston of Callendar在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Hepburn of Whitsome于1475年出生在苏格兰斯林史爾吉爾斯时，她的父亲Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome31岁，母亲Janet Napier35岁。她于1495年与William Livingston 4th Lord Livingston of Callendar在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Hepburn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham) and Scottish: habitational name from Hepburn in Chillingham (Northumberland), Hebron (Northumberland), or Hebburn in Jarrow (Durham). The placenames probably all derive from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. Compare Hebron .

variants.name: Eborn
meanings: English (Middlesex, Buckinghamshire, and Oxfordshire): variant of Eburne, itself a possible variant of Hepburn . However, the placename Hepburn comes from northeastern England, and the H- spellings are a late development, which reinforces the suspicion that the name may have a different but unknown derivation.

variants.name: Hebron
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Hebron (Northumberland), possibly from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. See also Hepburn .
Czech: from the Biblical placename (II Samuel 2: 1-3), said to mean ‘alliance’ in Hebrew.

variants.name: Heyburn
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, probably in southern England, named with an unknown first element + Old English burna ‘spring, stream’.
Irish (Ulster): possibly a variant of Scottish   Hepburn  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Hepburn of Whitsome was born in 1475, in Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome, was 31 and her mother, Janet Napier, was 35. She married William Livingston 4th Lord Livingston of Callendar in 1495, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Hepburn of Whitsome est née en 1475, à Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Janet Napier, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé William Livingston 4th Lord Livingston of Callendar en 1495, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Hepburn of Whitsome 1475 in Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome 31 und ihre Mutter Janet Napier 35. Sie hat 1495 in Scotland William Livingston 4th Lord Livingston of Callendar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Hepburn of Whitsome è nata il nel 1475 nel Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Janet Napier, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato William Livingston 4th Lord Livingston of Callendar nel 1495, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Hepburn of Whitsomeが1475年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアキルシスで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsomeは31歳，母Janet Napierは35歳であった。1495年にスコットランドでWilliam Livingston 4th Lord Livingston of Callendarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Hepburn of Whitsome(이)가 1475년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 킬시스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Napier(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1495년 스컷랜드에서 William Livingston 4th Lord Livingston of Callendar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Hepburn of Whitsome nasceu em 1475, em Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Janet Napier, tinha 35 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Hepburn of Whitsome родилась в 1475 г. в местности килсит, стирлингшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Janet Napier, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Livingston 4th Lord Livingston of Callendar в 1495 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына.
